title: Stegia trimestris
taxonomy: Stegia trimestris is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the tribe Galinsogeae within the family. Stegia trimestris is a member of the genus Stegia, which is a group of plants that are native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is also known as the three-stigmas thistle or three-stigmas stevia. It is closely related to other plants in the same family, such as the sunflower and the dandelion.
